UpdateRecord.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters.
UpdateRecord.rr: Host record, e.g. "www". The combined length of the record value and zone name must not exceed 255 characters.
UpdateRecord.value: Record value, e.g. IP: "192.168.1.1", CNAME: "cname.baidu.com", MX: "mail.baidu.com".
UpdateRecord.ttl: TTL for the record in the local DNS server cache (in seconds). Default: 300s (Basic), 120s (Standard), 1s (Enterprise). Must be a positive integer.
UpdateRecord.priority: Priority for MX records. Valid range: [0, 50]. Required when the record type is MX.
